name: Mekonomen AB (publ)
summary: Mekonomen AB (publ) operates a chain of car service stores in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Poland, and Finland. It provides spare parts, consumables, and tools, as well as workshop services under the ProMeister brand; and car accessories under the Carwise brand. The company offers a range of solutions and products for the consumers and companies through its stores, affiliated workshops, and wholesale operations. It operates 396 stores; and 3,568 affiliated workshops under the AutoMester, AlltiBil, BilXtra, CarPeople, Din Bilpartner, Hella Servicepartner, Inter Data Service, MECA Car Service, Mekonomen Bilverkstad, MekoPartner, O.K. Serwis, and Speedy brands. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
